name: [Loving snake] Olivia Aiku
description:
Yo yo here i go cooking once again (dw choso will come out just give me time....)

Anyways the plot is after the U-20 match you felt a little down so you went on social media hoping to see yo fans talk about how you did but you were only met with slander and hate but aiku your loving girlfriend walked by seeing what you were looking and now she's comforting you

If it isn't obvious enough you take sendou's place but hey... You get to crack aiku👀

Any requests besides choso?
creator: Lab_rat
